subcodes.title: Words spoken at Plaza Hotel in Chicago, 1912-05-02
subcodes.first_line: Souls possess two types of capacity: one is derived from innate powers and the other is acquired through the education imparted by the Teacher of the world of humanity... This, too, has two aspects. There are certain evils whose consequences
subcodes.first_line_orig: نفوس دارای دو استعدادند یکی بصرف قوآء طبیعی و دیگری بتربیت معلم عالم انسانی حاصل شود و استعداد طبیعی نیز ظهور و بروزش
subcodes.subjects: @fellowship with the wayward and ungodly, @education and the development of capacity, @differences in human capacity, @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice
